findings.summary: ipc.ts has 54 magic string IPC channels (50 ipcMain.handle + 4 ipcMain.on), plus 3 webContents.send channels. Dirty diff extracts GitHub OAuth to github-ipc.ts but that file does not exist. No channel constants exist.
preload/index.ts has 62+ channel references (56 invoke + 6 on + 4 send), all magic strings. ElectronAPI type in types.ts has 65 methods with type-safe payloads but zero channel name awareness.
ipc.ts: 50 ipcMain.handle + 4 ipcMain.on + 3 webContents.send = 57 magic strings. GitHub OAuth extracted to github-ipc.ts but file missing.
preload/index.ts: 62 channel references (56 invoke + 6 on + 4 send), all magic strings. ElectronAPI: 65 methods, zero channel type awareness.

APP_IDS duplicated across index.ts and migrate.ts (3 identical strings). process.env.HOME in apps.ts. Hardcoded OS paths in migrate.ts. ensureLoopbackNoProxy, serializeError, useEnvProxy duplicated across files.
github-ipc.ts does not exist but is imported. 6 GitHub OAuth channels need creation. Hardcoded client ID Iv23li7XUy0RKw5TlZ3K needs extracting to environment config.
